title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker, Slow Cooker, Rice Cooker, Steamer, Sauté, Yogurt Maker, Warmer & Sterilizer, Includes App With Over 800 Recipes, Stainless Steel, 6 Quart
bullet_points: 7-IN-1 FUNCTIONALITY: Pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, and food warmer all in one
QUICK ONE-TOUCH COOKING: 13 customizable Smart Programs for ribs, soups, beans, rice, poultry, yogurt, desserts and more
COOK FAST OR SLOW: Pressure cook delicious one-pot meals up to 70% faster than traditional cooking methods, or slow cook your favorite traditional recipes
SAFE AND DEPENDABLE: 10+ safety features, overheat protection, safe locking lid; USDA certified food-safe inner pot
EASY TO CLEAN: Fingerprint-resistant stainless-steel sides; dishwasher-safe lid, inner pot, and accessories
